programme.title: Pena ajena
programme.desc: Shaun, un surfer talentoso pero desenfocado, encuentra inspiración en la novela de Martin Skinner y deja Orange County para estudiar Arte Creativo en Stanford.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Gus and July save Lorena from Blue Duck, but at a deadly cost. Jake runs with a bad crowd and pays the price. July accepts that his wife has left him and stays on at Clara's with his newborn son.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: The cattle drive reaches Nebraska, where Gus and Clara reunite. Drought and Indian attacks take their toll as the drive reaches Montana, and Gus is wounded. Call honors his best friend's request.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder
programme.desc: The four rowdy sons of Katie Elder return home for her funeral and to avenge her death.

programme.title: The Shootist
programme.desc: Afflicted with a terminal illness, John Bernard Books, the last of the legendary gunfighters, quietly returns to Carson City for medical attention from his old friend Dr. Hostetler.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine, and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: The Miracle Worker
programme.desc: Academy Awards went to Best Actress Anne Bancroft and Best Supporting Actress Patty Duke for their moving portrayals of Annie Sullivan and her remarkable blind and deaf pupil, Helen Keller.

programme.title: Elmer Gantry
programme.desc: A Best Actor Oscar went to Burt Lancaster for his outstanding performance as a con-man-turned-preacher in this provocative indictment of religious corruption.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: George Eastman is a poor young man determined to win a place in society and the heart of a beautiful socialite (Elizabeth Taylor). Shelley Winters plays the factory girl whose dark secret threatens Eastman’s professional and romantic prospects.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard
programme.desc: Intense, enthralling, and unforgettable, Sunset Boulevard stars Gloria Swanson as Norma Desmond, a faded silent-movie star, and William Holden as Joe Gillis, a down-on-his-luck screenwriter whom she enlists to help her make her triumphant return.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate
programme.desc: Frank Sinatra, Laurence Harvey, Janet Leigh, and Angela Lansbury headline an all-star cast in this daring thriller rife with political intrigue, mental manipulation, and a diabolical plot that may lead to the highest levels of the government.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: After Felix induces Oscar to appear on the popular talk show Steinberg is guest-hosting, his roommate gives a riotous account of Felix's prissiness. Felix is incensed, and when Steinberg invites him to make a rebuttal, he leaps at the opportunity.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Shady Rest Hotel acquires a house physician, much to the distress of proprietor Kate.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe becomes a fight promoter when he meets up with a young local plumber with the size and strength of a gorilla.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A week in New York City transforms Betty Jo from a country girl into a svelte sophisticate.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe's, arch-enemy of the Hooterville Cannonball, returns to Hooterville Valley in adject disgrace and poverty.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: One of Kate's old flames pays a visit,but his efforts to rekindle their romance are thwarted by his dominating sister.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe becomes the new postmaster of Hooterville and moves the post office to the Shady Rest hotel.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When word spreads that an agricultural student is coming to Hooterville to study with county agent Hank Kimball, no one seems to be interested. However, things change when the folks discover that the student is an attractive blonde.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: This episode tells the unusual tale of Hooterville's founding. As the town prepares for its centennial, Oliver announces a reenactment of the town's origins and casts himself and Lisa in the roles of Horace and Doris Hooter.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a blue feather arrives in the mail for Lisa, her Hungarian roots tell her that trouble is brewing. The feather is a symbol of malfortune to come, and she suspects it was sent by Hungarian gypsies, a warning that they are out to get her.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Don't count chickens before they hatch! Oliver thinks he's laid a gold egg of an idea when he decides to dive beak first into the business of raising chickens. Lisa, on the other hand, sees little difference between raising chickens and children.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: All that glitters is not frosted cereal. After a jewelry heist in Chicago, the robbers foolishly stash their booty in the grain bin of a cereal manufacturer. Oliver and Lisa discover the jewels in their bowl of Crickly Wickly!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver Wendell Douglas returns from farm to firm... law firm, that is. When a young and ambitious local graduates from law school, he looks for a potential partner in Hooterville. Oliver is the logical choice. Lisa and Eb help the new venture.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend, but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the sergeant what an asset this new friend is to the platoon.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain "Iron Pants" Martin, Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy, Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt. Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt. Carter.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter tries to make Gomer dislike him before graduation, feeling that he hasn't done his job correctly if he isn't hated by ALL the recruits.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: While in town on pass Sgt. Carter decides to play a joke on Gomer by setting him on a quest to get a kiss from "The Dragon Lady" but in order for it to work he will need Duke's help.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Disguised as a German officer's wife, Newkirk collects penicillin for the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: To capture some secret papers, Hogan has a Russian woman convince Klink to volunteer for the Russian front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps prove the German officer that Klink is defending is innocent of treason so he can get the plans that he had stolen for the Allies.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Heroes have to figure how to get a new type of rocket back to England.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must get a U.S. general out of camp just as General Burkhalter's sister shows up with her intended - Klink's new number two.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has to discredit a German officer who knows about the operations at Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The underground team that needs help in blowing up a mobile rocket-launcher battery includes a very lovely woman.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Rock star found with head smashed in empty pool" That headline would end the gravy train so his managers fake a kidnapping to salvage something, but they are unaware of a witness.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A blind pianist whose sight has been restored kills his blackmail victim just before Barnaby arrives. Barnaby suspects him but must prove he can see.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A suspicious hit-and-run brings Barnaby to a little town where sudden riches are obvious. "Town council meetings" are a cover for plotting murder, and Barnaby is in their sights.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A murdered mistress and a missing wife bring Barnaby Jones onto the case. The problem? Two weeks have passed, and the killer has covered his tracks.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A well-to-do, stylish, Raffles-type jewel thief steals from Waikiki hotel rooms for the thrill of the chase. As his calling card, he leaves a series of clues that add up to an elegant method of operation.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Danny and a college professor are kidnapped and held as hostages, to be killed unless two members of a radical group are released from jail. McGarrett, backed by the Governor, refuses to comply with the ransom demands of the kidnappers.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A geothermal dynamics genius, plagued by personal financial problems and pressured by a loan shark, plots an extortion scheme that would trigger a man-made volcanic eruption, wiping out the entire city of Hilo.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Postcards from a psychopath taunting McGarrett to remember crime victims of the past precede a series of re-enacted murders. Eddie Josephs puts down the authorities by recreating murders featured in a series of Honolulu magazine articles.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett is on the trail of a suave crook who peddles his stolen goods to legitimate businessmen by socializing with fashion models and buyers. The wily thief has eluded the law by directing and supervising the hijacking of goods.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: (1/1) Twenty years after a young woman is gruesomely murdered, a similar crime is committed where the victim's heart is removed. (2/2) Chief Bill Gillespie and Chief Detective Virgil Tibbs continue to work together to solve the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A respected citizen and prominent businessman of Sparta (Wallace Wilkinson) is mysteriously murdered after a dedication ceremony for a statue he created in the town center...and his family is the prime suspects as a dark family secret is revealed.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from Virgil's best friend and former partner in Philadelphia, Matthew Pogue, happens to coincide with the murder of two federal agents and an organized crime witness. Could the two events be connected?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Chief Bill Gillespie discovers that a longtime friend and sheriff of neighboring Butler County, Ed Thompson, is a racist. In good conscience, he must investigate the deaths of black prisoners as racial tensions boil over between the two counties.

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed finds a town of ghosts, Emma gets put into harness.

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed drives a train, Emma is tied to the tracks.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar assumes the identity of unsuspecting Tristan Brown to catch a con man awaiting delivery of charitable funds.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar takes a job as chauffeur for his quarry, an errant father who fled to Florence with a huge sum of money, guest Richard Tyler.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: An American airman is seeking revenge against The Saint and starts by putting a 5,000-pound bounty on his head.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A new witness, one who saw the one-armed man, comes forward on behalf of Dr. Richard Kimble.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Innocent acceptance of an apparently menial job as a porter at a swank country club, involves Dr. Richard Kimble in a top secret government experiment.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble falls and lands in the home of a Naturopath and finds himself fighting against bad medical practice and romantic advances from his host's wife.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble makes a careless error disclosing his whereabouts and Lt. Gerard, hastily returning from a vacation with his wife, closes in.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Caine (DAVID CARRADINE), proving that faith is a two-edged sword of good and evil, breaks a witch's very real curse over a whole town.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Caine (DAVID CARRADINE), confronted with ignorance and prejudice, saves an outcast from turning a brief moment of glory into disaster for himself and his pregnant Native American wife.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Caine (DAVID CARRADINE), in a reversal of roles, finds himself as the master with a 15-year-old boy (DON JOHNSON) as his disciple in which he must teach him that the act of revenge can lead to the death of the spirit.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Without returning violence for violence, Caine (DAVID CARRADINE) ends the tyranny of a "Chinese Mafia" and liberates a boy slave.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: A meek, unassuming college professor (Donald Pleasence) invents a device capable of controlling the entire electromagnetic spectrum and realizes the device has unleashed his subconscious thirst for revenge—with uncontrollable and deadly results!

programme.desc: Ed Sullivan presents Lesley Gore, Morecambe & Wise, Szony and Claire, The Baranton Sisters, and Tony Bennett.

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ed Sullivan presents The Jackson 5, Sonny James, The Little Step Brothers, Marilyn Michaels, Roger Williams, and George Carlin.

programme.desc: Ed Sullivan presents The Ike and Tina Turner Revue, Flip Wilson, Tiny Tim, Sonny James, Vino Venito, and Gwen Verdon.

programme.desc: Flip Wilson's "Rescuing Princess Geraldine"; George Jessel's "Good Old Days, New Year"; Skiles and Henderson's "Peace Corps"; London Lee's "Dating and Teenagers

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Don Knotts does a medical convention monologue and disrupts officer Freddie Johnson’s date with Melba Moore.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Fresh from acting in Lady Sings The Blues, Richard Pryor does brilliant stand-up and skits with veteran funnyman Don Knotts.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Guests trade off doing bench skits with Flip; Redd provides inspiration for an artist (Flip) and Joan Rivers does brilliant stand-up.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Steve Lawrence and Rock Hudson stop by to join in the fun and merriment, with the movie spoof "The Murderer Always Rings Twice", and a meeting with an interior decorator in this week's "Carol & Sis.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The great Carl Reiner joins Carol and the gang! Carl appears in two sketches in this episode: as the husband of an accident-prone woman, and as a marriage counselor to a comedienne and her spouse.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Guest stars Bing Crosby and Paul Lynde take a trip to Canoga Falls in tonight's "As The Stomach Turns." And on "The Old Folks", Lynde joins the elderly duo to celebrate Veteran's Day.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Another batch of kitchen commercials highlights this episode, while Tim returns as the steelworker looking to do away with annoying wife Carol.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Guests John Byner and Helen Reddy join Carol and Harvey in a sketch about swingers looking for the ladies. And over at Mama's house, The Family get into an unapologetically hilarious game of "Sorry!

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Tim Conway and Steve Lawrence guest star! A chimp's bite leads to some monkey business for Tim in one sketch, while another features a business relationship resembling a failed romantic relationship.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Tim as they spoof a classic Joan Crawford film in the sketch "Mildred Fierce.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Pat Carroll and Jack Jones are Carol's exciting and new guests. Pat and Carol play competing commercial actresses up for the same role. Plus: another chapter of "As The Stomach Turns.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: We're so glad we had this time together, but it's time to say "so long" as Carol closes the book on one of the greatest variety shows in television history.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Guests Anthony Newley and Dick Martin are anything but clueless in tonight's tribute to detectives in the movies, while Carol and Vicki are single and ready to mingle in a sketch set in a singles bar.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: Dana Carvey discusses his Saturday Night Live characters and being vaguely famous. Also appearing are author Joe Garagiola and pranksters David Teitelbaum and Jack Saltzberg.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show: Comic Legends Of The '60s
programme.desc: Comedy master Carl Reiner ate his way through France and now complains to Johnny about his weight gain. Shows a clip from his movie, Summer Rentals.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: Before his big break, movie legend Charlton Heston made ends meet in New York City by working as an artist’s model. The two-time Oscar winner describes his world travels and his two Oscars.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve admires the beautiful and shy owner of a local café.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie starts to develop feelings for Sally, Mike's fiance.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg steals the mascot from his rival school the night before the big game, and Mike tries to help him return it before he gets in big trouble.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia, Jan and Peter each get jobs at the local ice cream parlor, each with varying results.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby saves Peter from potential serious injury after he pushes him out of the way of a falling ladder. A grateful Peter offers to become Bobby's "slave for life," something that Bobby takes quick advantage of.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The rival school's quarterback suddenly takes an interest in Marcia the week of the football game., and Mike is Jealous when Carol's high school sweetheart comes for a visit.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan thinks she' has no talent after not being chosen for a ballet recital, so the family tries to make her feel better and help her find a skill.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike takes the entire family on a trip to King's Island amusement park, where he is to submit plans to a client, but the a mix-up causes the blueprints to go missing at the park.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: A series of misunderstandings lead the Bradys to believe that Alice and Sam are up to much more than just bowling on their upcoming Saturday night date.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan makes a bunch of promises to be elected "Most Popular Girl" in her class, but backs out of them after she wins the election. Meanwhile, Mike and Carol try to make plans for their second honeymoon.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria befriends the box boy, George, who works at the local supermarket and happens to be mentally handicapped. When Archie discovers this, all of his misconceptions come pouring out and he encourages Gloria not to lead him on.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith, Mike and Gloria are each extended a special invitation to attend Lionel's engagement party. However, Archie isn't invited, that is until a big argument between Louise and George results in Louise deciding to invite him.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie comes home for a nice dinner that Edith has prepared: beef and mushroom stew. Later, Mike breaks the news that there's been a recall of mushrooms. Convinced that he has food poisoning, Archie rushes down to the hospital for treatment.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria comes home from work one evening in a total apathetic mood. When Archie tries to find out what's wrong with her, she snaps at him and storms off. Later, she confides in Edith that she thinks that she has temporarily fallen out of love with Mike.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike's graduation day is coming up fast. Archie begins acting nicely to Mike, since Archie has high hopes that once Mike graduates, he will finally move out of the house and begin repaying Archie the room and board that he owes him.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie stops by Jefferson Cleaners to pick up some dry cleaning and pays with a twenty dollar bill. Later, a furious George shows up at the Bunker's front door claiming the bill Archie passed to him was counterfeit.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Faruk invita a la señora Esma a su oficina para confrontarla. Él la acusa de dejar Begüm y de haberle robado 10 años de su vida como padre de Emir.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Esma le hace una visita sorpresa a Begüm para exigirle cómo debe tratar a Emir. Süreyya es informada de que necesita una amniocentesis. İpek descubre que está embarazada.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Emir le devuelve a Esma el broche que se le cayó cuando fue a hablar con Begüm, y Faruk enfurece al enterarse de esa visita, por lo que decide dejar la mansión junto con Süreyya.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Esma deja la mansión con Nurgül y Mustafa sin avisar a nadie. Faruk y Süreyya van a ver la casa a la que se mudarán muy pronto.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: İpek llega al nuevo hogar de Süreyya y Faruk para contarle a Süreyya sobre la relación pasada entre Faruk y Begüm. Murat es gravemente herido en un accidente de motocicleta.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Begüm invita a Faruk a su casa para ver fotos de Emir de cuando era un bebé. Süreyya llega inesperadamente a la casa de Begüm y los encuentra a ambos juntos.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Süreyya se enfrenta a Dilara y la presiona para que averigüe si Adem es su compañero en la escuela de música. Bade visita a Murat en el hospital.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Faruk y Süreyya van al hospital para obtener los resultados de la amniocentesis.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Después de que Faruk descubre que Fikret está haciendo negocios con Adem, la policía allana el negocio de Adem y es arrestado.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Süreyya sorprende a Faruk y lo espera en un yate mientras él se encuentra en una reunión de trabajo. Esma le pide al abogado una consulta sobre el testamento de su difunto esposo.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Esma se entera que Reyhan ha sido la amante de su esposo durante años y que también es la madre de Adem, por lo que decide confrontarla.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Esma devuelve a Fikret el derecho de firma en la empresa. Adem le revela a Dilara que su padre es el difunto esposo de Esma.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Dilara le revela a Süreyya que Adem es el hermano de Faruk. Faruk encuentra a Emir y lo regresa a casa.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Senem escucha a Faruk decirle a su madre que Emir es su hijo. Süreyya es internada en el hospital inesperadamente.

programme.desc: Una mujer quien se ha conocido por sufrir de depresión aparentemente se quitó su propia vida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1971, John List dejó una nota con los cuerpos de su madre, esposa y tres hijos en el salón de baile de su mansión antes de desaparecer por completo. Los detectives deben resolver el caso, a pesar de tener solo una fotografía desactualizada de List.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un saco de dormir desechado, que contiene zapatillas de deporte ensangrentadas y un bolso, lleva a la policía al cuerpo de una mujer joven.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el secretario de la corte, Peter Porco, no se presenta a trabajar en noviembre de 2004, se ordena a un oficial de la corte que se dirija a la casa familiar de los Porcos en Bethlehem, Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El examinador médico clasificó la muerte como un accidente, pero los detectives que investigaron el caso declararon que la evidencia en la escena indicaba lo contrario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, los cadáveres de Joan Rogers y sus dos hijas adolescentes fueron encontrados flotando en la Bahía de Tampa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los médicos quedan desconcertados cuando un niño de dos años es trasladado urgentemente al hospital con convulsiones cerebrales y dificultades para respirar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía de Virginia Beach llegó al departamento de Makdessi para encontrar los cuerpos ensangrentados de Elise Makdessi y de Quincy Brown, un soldado de la Marina. ¿Pero era el amante de Elise o su agresor?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una estudiante universitaria desaparece, sus compañeros de clase estaban preocupados por la seguridad de ella y la de ellos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fuego Plástico
programme.desc: Sheila Bryan, quien fue condenada por matar a su madre en el incendio de un carro, recibe un nuevo juicio. La opinión de un testigo experto en incendios sobre cómo se encendió el fuego difiere de la teoría de la fiscalía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pedido fatal
programme.desc: Un hombre es encontrado muerto en su casa y su ex esposa tiene una coartada perfecta. Para determinar la hora de la muerte, los investigadores deben saber cuándo comió la víctima por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Voto de silencio
programme.desc: Una mirada al caso contra Jack Reeves. Unos amigos informaron que su novia por correo había desaparecido. La policía centró sus sospechas en Reeves y, mientras buscaba pistas, descubrió información que lo vinculaba con la muerte de dos ex esposas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer fue brutalmente asesinada en su casa y los únicos testigos del crimen fueron los perros de la familia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Este episodio documenta un atentado mortal en una iglesia en Oakwood, Illinois, en diciembre de 1997.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre, lo que hablaba del horror del crimen: el asesinato de dos niños pequeños y el apuñalamiento de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El pensamiento rápido de un investigador lo ayuda a capturar una huella de zapato hecha en la nieve antes de que la evidencia se desvanezca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante seis años, un asesino en serie merodeó por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Poco después del amanecer, se inicia un incendio en un contenedor de basura en Vancouver. Nadie ve al pirómano ni el fuego, que arde durante horas en el estacionamiento desolado. Pero hay más que basura en este contenedor en llamas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Es musgo, no grama
programme.desc: Una joven fue encontrada muerta en un campo de golf en las Bahamas. El césped de ese campo era tan distintivo que tenía valor probatorio. La evidencia llevó a la policía a dos sospechosos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Leann Fletcher, los investigadores usan análisis de salpicaduras de sangre y computación forense para encontrar el motivo de su asesinato: su esposo, estaba teniendo una aventura con la jueza Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Bruce Miller fue asesinado a tiros en la oficina del negocio de depósito de chatarra que poseía. La escena del crimen estaba casi inmaculada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In this two-hour season premiere of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team, 600 hopeful candidates arrive at Cowboys Stadium for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp opens and many of the new candidates have had to uproot their lives and move to Dallas with no guarantee of making it through Training Camp to become a Dallas Cowboy Cheerleader.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad has their first game day performance behind them, but after a bad rehearsal, Kelli warns her new team she will cut girls if they don't give 110 percent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Doom

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Doom

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Deadly Assassin
programme.desc: The Doctor returns to Gallifrey and races to prevent a tragedy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Deadly Assassin

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Deadly Assassin

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Deadly Assassin

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.desc: A woman's aggressive dogs are coming in between her and her husband; a German shepard who failed obedience school; a Sheltie barks in the car and bites other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A lab-beagle mix needs help to be socialized; a woman worries about the aggressive behavior of her new husband's dog; a Shar-Pei behaves aggressively toward the TV.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese tries to bite and attack people; a spoiled Pomeranian; a Rottweiler vents his aggression on shopping carts.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A follow-up on the Hurricane Katrina dogs Cesar took; a German shepherd mix is difficult to walk; a chocolate lab refuses to walk on her family's new hardwood floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd bites people and lunges at strangers since losing an eye; a hound from an animal-testing lab fears people; a Maltese shows aggressive behavior and relieves itself on the carpet.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt, Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The bounty-hunter adventures of Duane "Dog" Chapman and his Posse are chronicled in this one hour "Best Of" special, featuring superlative memorable moments from the previous seven seasons.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once in Montrose, Dog discovers that the million dollar fugitive is not the young bondsman's only problem. Dog and Beth make it their mission to both clean up the mess and teach him the fundamentals of bondsmanship.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues' gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: 10 Puppies And Us

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers

programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with the so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Leticia está a punto de caer en los brazos de Víctor. Él se pasa nuevamente de tragos y le suelta a Marisa su secreto. Los negocios de Calixta despiertan sospechas. Ty le pide una promesa a Cristóbal y le aconseja que no renuncie a ser feliz.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal recibe los encargos de su padre a pocas horas de la riesgosa operación. Tito revela que ya tiene medio cuerpo fuera del closet y Sara le saca provecho. Las advertencias de Hugo suben de tono, mientras Marisa descubre lo inesperado.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Crece la tensión, la operación de Ty se alarga más de los esperado. Cristóbal se apoya en Marisa, quien está a punto de renunciar. Estanislao pone a prueba a Calixta y le pide 50 mil dólares para un negocio. Lalo regresa cambiado y cansado.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta se entera que Alicia estuvo en el colegio para acompañar a Felipe y Duván en la entrega de medallas y estalla en reclamos, pero Sebastián no se queda de brazos cruzados.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia acepta la invitación de Sebastián, él le dice lo que siente, pero se confunde por la reacción de ella. Perfecta le pide a Laurentino que averigüe por qué su exnuera quedó en libertad.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián decide asistir a la inauguración del hotel de Briñón, pero no piensa ir solo. Alicia se sorprende al ver a Justino listo para el evento, le dice que no tiene ganas de acompañarlo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia está nerviosa, amenaza a Sebastián con ir al juzgado para recuperar a los gemelos, pero su respuesta debe esperar cuando son interrumpidos. Se arma tremendo escándalo en el bar.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina y Reinaldo harán una fiesta para renovar sus votos y Antonio se la juega por reconquistar a Patricia. Hay gran expectativa por la pelea entre los boxeadores Máximo y Murillo. Juan Pablo finalmente habla con Esther sobre la paternidad.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina entra en shock con la llegada de la tía Iris. Esta la acorrala pidiéndole que la ayude una vez más, si no quiere que le cuente a Reinaldo todos sus secretos. Máximo y Murillo se enfrentan. Antonio irrumpe borracho en la fiesta.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Antonio es expulsado a golpes de la fiesta pero se lleva el gran premio: Patricia le confiesa que aún lo ama. Kike y Clara hacen el amor. Teresa Cristina deja la fiesta y va tras Griselda al enterarse que ella hizo los arreglos del Gourmet Palmer.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina insulta a Griselda y la humilla diciéndole que se ilusiona en vano con su marido. Reinaldo visita a Griselda, se disculpa, intenta consolarla, pero acaban despidiéndose para siempre. Bárbara presiona a Máximo para que vuelva a pelear.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara busca el apoyo de Amelia para conquistar a Cristóbal, pero Marisa no se queda muda ante la soberbia de Sara. El senador está muy delicado y la familia teme perderlo. Marisa sorprende a Víctor con Leticia en una habitación del hotel.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Leticia está a punto de caer en los brazos de Víctor. Él se pasa nuevamente de tragos y le suelta a Marisa su secreto. Los negocios de Calixta despiertan sospechas. Ty le pide una promesa a Cristóbal y le aconseja que no renuncie a ser feliz.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Fleming, un restaurante danés en Miami. El obstinado dueño no quiere actualizar el lugar y Ramsay descubre algo en la hielera que lo lleva a cerrar el restaurante.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Susan Fassett was gunned down as she left her church choir practice in Poughkeepsie, NY. After clearing her husband, police turned their attention to Fred Andros, with whom Susan had an affair.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, a human skull retrieved from an Ohio pond reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate that the victim had been stabbed multiple times and that the teeth had been removed with needle-nose pliers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Brian and Beverly Mauck were found dead in their Graham, Washington home. Using a bloody palm print and shoe prints at the scene, investigators focus their attention on Daniel Tavares, who had previously inked a tattoo on Brian's back.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by behaving oddly toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a popular song about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius and takes the song's composer captive with the intent of creating his own song.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails rescue Lucas, Robotnik's first prisoner, and attempt to reunite him with his girlfriend, Lucinda. However, Robotnik is also in love with Lucinda and pursues Lucas.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: En route to stop a train of explosives from arriving at Robotnik's munition factory, Sonic and Tails must deal with a duo of bears named Big Griz and Mad Mike after Scratch and Grounder tell them that Sonic and Tails are the enemies.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home to ensure his safety, Robotnik finds out and creates a robot fox family, who pose as Tails' long-lost parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch suffers a blow to the head and believes that he is his favorite television character, Edgar Eagle. Sonic uses this to his advantage in preventing another of Robotnik's schemes.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a fair in his honor, Sonic's shoes are stolen and he and Tails use detective intellect to try and solve the whodunit case.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Momma Robotnik visits her son, and after he fails once again, she disowns him and decides to adopt Sonic as her son to capture him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Grounder accidentally puts a "genius chip"in his head and it makes him so smart that he easily captures Sonic and even takes over Robotnik's operations.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik introduces the "Ultra Freeze-O-Matic", announcing his plan to freeze every citizen on Mobius so that he can install "Servitude Chips"into the frozen citizens and make them unquestionably obedient. Sonic and Tails must foil the scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik is after the Power Gems from the city of Submerbia in the Labyrinth Zone. Sonic and Tails are enlisted by a local citizen to stop Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's attempt to turn Sonic into an old man with his newest device backfires, turning him and Tails, and later himself, into babies. Now stuck in a day-care the infantile Sonic and Tails must try to keep Robotnik under control.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik constructs a robot son in order to help him with his conquest of Mobius. Robotnik Jr., however, is inspired by Sonic, and helps him thwart his latest plan.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik makes chewing gum that makes the consumer as fast as Sonic. Robotnik gives it to Grounder, but he loses and Tails gets a hold of it.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik attempts to brainwash MacHopper, a friend of Sonic's into doing his dirty deeds, but an explosion causes his memory to become unstable.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik opens up a resort to make the resident Mobians his slaves, Sonic enlists the help of some robots from an area of Mobius called Scrap Valley

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder into space to pillage the asteroid belt, with Sonic and Tails in pursuit. When the spaceship runs out of power, they are stranded at an abandoned space station, pursued by a residing alien.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik starves a village of rabbits into building a statue of himself. With help from Big Griz and Mad Mike, Sonic and Updike, one of the villagers, manage to infiltrate the statue.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik seemingly announces his surrender to Sonic, and he invites him to a resort in his gratitude. Unbeknownst to Sonic, the resort is just another trap created by Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pursues Breezie and Robotnik Jr. in order to find out why they betrayed him with the intent of building a perpetually loyal robot wife. In a subplot, Junior is in love with Breezie, and enlists Sonic's help in wooing her.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On Sonic's birthday, Tails builds a flying bicycle. Realizing Tails' potential with mechanics, Professor Von Schlemmer invites Tails to be his research assistant.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.desc: The wild black stallion that Amy rehomed from Will's ranch is brutally forced out of the herd by the new leader, leaving Amy to track down the injured horse and nurse him back to health.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.desc: Los chefs se preparan para su tercer servicio de cena, pero la presión de Hell's Kitchen es demasiado para un concursante.

programme.desc: Los concursantes intentan recrear los platos característicos de Gordon para un público exigente de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: En la primera mitad de este especial de dos horas, el chef Ramsay revela el último giro: cada equipo creará su propio menú que consta de tres aperitivos, platos principales y postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día siete
programme.desc: En la parte final de este especial de dos horas, los cinco concursantes restantes descubren que ya no compiten como equipos, sino como individuos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Los cuatro chefs restantes reciben quince minutos y una bandeja con sobras para crear una comida que el chef Ramsay considera servible.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay ordena a los tres concursantes restantes que sirvan una cena completa. ¿Quién creará el mejor plato y quién será enviado a casa sin postre?

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: Rie is being held captive though she does not realize it. She believes the man holding her is a friend of her father, Ken Makita. Lupin shows up to rescue her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Gordon, an FBI computer specialist, is in Japan to operate a computer capable of predicting crimes and determining how to stop them. The Metropolitan Police Department hopes that this will finally help them capture Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A disputed horde of recently discovered ancient gold coins draws the attention of Lupin and company. As the ownership of the coins is disputed, Lupin decides to settle the matter on his own by stealing them from the Dai Nippon Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's been a long time since Jigen, Goemon and Fujiko have heard from Lupin. Then one day, they each receive an invitation from Lupin for a reunion aboard the luxury liner Sirloin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An international soccer game is taking place in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil and Lupin has his eyes on the box office and betting takes. Will the box office heist go as planned?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An old man who supposedly knows the secret to Hitler's legacy lives in East Germany within the Berlin Wall. Lupin and his gang track the old man down, but the old man can't recall anything about any legacy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: At Loch Ness in Scotland, the mysterious monster Nessie reveals itself from the lake, charmed by Fujiko's singing. Seeing this, Doctor Oz decides to use Fujiko to capture Nessie for his personal gain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko and a mystery man have an enticing job for Lupin: Stealing a ton of gold bullion from a Swiss Bank, a bank renowned for its tight security. Can it be done? What is the mystery man's true identity?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A man is threatening to destroy the Leaning Tower of Pisa with a device that generates artificial earthquakes. The Italian government has no choice but to meet the culprit's, but Lupin takes the ransom for himself!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the golden death mask of Tutankhamen, the ancient Egyptian pharaoh known as the "boy king." However, when Lupin tries on the golden death mask he becomes possessed by an ominous curse.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Trans Europe Superexpress train has departed Venice and is headed to France. Onboard the Superexpress is crime boss Don Marcino's ill-gotten treasures. Can Lupin and his gang pull off the heist before the train reaches its destination?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin meets the grandson of master Ukiyoe artist, Toushusai Sharaku and learns that he has been switching his own works with his grandfather's originals. Unable to switch the last painting due to illness, he asks Lupin to switch it in his stead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko have been invited to a party hosted by Marcel Dulane, a member of Paris' high society. However, the elegant party turns out to be a trap. Fujiko is taken hostage and Lupin, with a time-bomb belt strapped to his waist…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Monaco to race his new toy in the Monaco Grand Prix. Or so he thought. Lupin ends up losing both his money and race car in a fixed poker game at the casino.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/25/87: Greg Gagne, Kirby Puckett, and Tom Brunansky each recorded two hits and Frank Viola struck out seven batters in eight innings to help clinch the Twins' first-ever World Series title over the Cardinals.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/23/88 - The Yankees headed to the bottom of the 9th down 4-3 to the Red Sox. Rickey Henderson helped orchestrate the tying run and give New York hope. Bases loaded and two outs, Claudell Washington scored the winning run on an error by Jody Reed.

programme.title: World Series Films
programme.desc: This World Series Film showcases the 2011 matchup between the Cardinals and the Rangers. After being down to their last out twice in Game 6, St. Louis walked it off in extras and went on to win Game 7, securing the team's 11th World Series championship.

programme.title: MLB Docs
programme.desc: In one of the most famous arguments in MLB history, Royals icon George Brett's potentially game-winning home run is ruled an out due to an illegal bat, causing a scene at Yankee Stadium.

programme.title: Inside the Moments
programme.desc: On this episode of Inside the Moments, take a look at some of the greatest World Series finishes in baseball history.

programme.title: Epic Moments
programme.desc: In one of the greatest single-game World Series performances of all-time, Pablo Sandoval gets the Giants off and running with a three-homer game in Game 1 against the Tigers.

programme.title: Cathedrals of the Game
programme.desc: Host Michelle Beadle tours historic Wrigley Field, home of the Chicago Cubs.

programme.title: All-Star Highlights
programme.desc: Check out highlights from the 1967 MLB All-Star Game. The AL and NL were represented by some of baseball's best, including Rod Carew, Carl Yastrzemski, Roberto Clemente, and Hank Aaron.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/12/90: Danny Jackson, Norm Charlton, and Randy Myers combined to throw a one-hit, one-run gem that helped the Reds clinch the National League pennant against the Pirates.

programme.title: MST3K: The Beast Of Yucca Flats
programme.desc: After a devastating atomic test, Joseph Javorsky, a defecting Russian scientist, is transformed into a murderous radioactive beast. Can desert patrolmen Jim Archer and Joe Dobson stop the creature before it kills again?

programme.title: MST3K: The Atomic Brain
programme.desc: A rich, elderly woman wants her doctor to transplant her brain into the body of one of her young captives.

programme.title: MST3K: The Amazing Transparent Man
programme.desc: During the feature film The Amazing Transparent Man (1960), a mad scientist makes an escaped criminal invisible so he can steal radioactive supplies.

programme.title: MST3K: Hercules
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots have a casual day on the SOL and endure another incoherent Hercules movie (Hercules (1958)).

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Zigra
programme.desc: The seventh offering from Gamera: the infamous turtle faces off against an alien called Zigra determined on world domination. Joel and the Bots build a scale model of Gamera and make shoebox dioramas.

programme.title: MST3K: Mad Monster
programme.desc: Things get hairy on the Satellite of Love thanks to the lupine antics of The Mad Monster (1942) and the second chapter of Radar Men from the Moon (1952).

programme.title: MST3K: The Million Eyes Of Sumuru
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch an evil woman bent on world domination in THE MILLION EYES OF SUMURU (1967). The bots realize Jonah is tall.

programme.title: MST3K: The Batwoman
programme.desc: Emily's crew watch a scantily-clad Mexican superhero take on a mad scientist and his aquatic super-soldiers in THE BATWOMAN (1968).

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Ya hace un año que Jessica conoció al hombre de sus sueños por mensajes. Sin embargo no ha conocido a Emilio en persona, ni ha aceptado hacer video llamadas y eso la lleva a desconfiar de su identidad.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Karen entró en contacto con Álvaro por una red social, pero cuando él le propuso dar el siguiente paso en la relación ella se negó y Álvaro terminó borrándola de su red de amistades. Hoy día Karen necesita la ayuda de Diego y Sebastián.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace ya dos años que Freddy mantiene una relación en línea, se contactaron por las redes sociales y a medida que se fueron conociendo, comenzó a florecer una relación de amor en línea.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
